subcodes.first_line: The breezes of estrangement from them that walk upon the pebbles of heedlessness have assuredly wafted over the meadows of thy bountiful Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هبت علی ریاض ربک الفیاض نسایم الاعراض من الذین یمشون فی رضراض الغفله و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the concourse on high
